Infectum.turoyo: mə=kibax ya ḥurma əmmo mə=kibi ono mbeli tre ani mbeli ḥa=gawro (...) gabayye u=med-ano ġắlabe ko-ṣoʕəb aʕlayye, d-šəmʕi hawxa mede ʕal an=nišaṯṯe
translations:
‘(He said): “What is wrong with you, wife?” – She said:
			“What is wrong with me? Have I married two husbands or one?”
			(…) (And for them (these people) it was hard to hear such words
			from their wives).’ 78/29-30
